name: Masaledar Sem[spicy Green Beans]
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Green beans (Trim and cut in half)
1 1/2 Inches fresh ginger (Peel and chop into 1 inch-thick pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ginger and garlic in a food processor with 1/2 cup water. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a wide, heavy saucepan over medium flame. When hot, add cumin seeds and stir for half a minute.
3. Pour the ginger-garlic paste into the pan. Stir and cook for about two minutes.
4. Add coriander and stir a few times.
5. Put in chopped tomatoes and mash with the back of a slotted spoon. Cook for 2 minutes.
6. Add beans, salt, and one cup water. Bring to simmer.
7. Cover and reduce heat to low, cooking for 8-10 minutes or until beans are tender.
8. Remove cover, add lemon juice and freshly ground pepper.
9. Increase heat and boil away remaining liquid, stirring gently.
